basic_details.job_title: DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Darbhanga (DCPU Darbhanga)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Darbhanga (DCPU Darbhanga) Support Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Darbhanga district administration. A total of 25 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement No. 01/2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development
qualification.details: Graduate in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development or equivalent. 3 years of experience in child rights / child protection / legal work / social work / child psychology.

salary_details.details: Rs. 9000 Consolidated per POCSO case (in three installments).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://darbhanga.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Darbhanga Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development or equivalent. 3 years of experience in child rights / child protection / legal work / social work / child psychology.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 9000 Consolidated per POCSO case (in three installments).

content_sections.heading: DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://darbhanga.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Darbhanga Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Darbhanga Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DCPU Darbhanga Support Person recruitment is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Graduates in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, or Child Development. Additionally, 3 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Support Person post is between 30 years and 65 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 9000 per POCSO case, paid in three installments.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies for the Support Person post announced by the District Child Protection Unit Darbhanga.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DCPU Darbhanga Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Child Protection Unit Darbhanga, which is darbhanga.nic.in.
